message:
fix: eliminate SSR hydration mismatches for date rendering

Add ClientDate component that defers locale-dependent date formatting
to a useEffect, returning a stable fallback during SSR. Replace all
inline `new Date().toLocaleDateString()` calls in appeals page,
referral stats, and share dialog with <ClientDate />.

In enforcement.ts (server-side strings), switch to deterministic
`toISOString().split("T")[0]` since those messages never hit the
client hydration boundary.

ShareDialog also gets a toast import path fix (ui/toast -> ui/use-toast)
and a simplified prop API (open/onOpenChange -> isOpen).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
